label: Gardening
description: An everyday gardener channel — practical, conversational, leans on sensory detail.

visuals.style_description: Warm, natural daylight photography in real backyards — not studio, not magazine-perfect. Slightly desaturated, documentary feel. Plants as they actually look: dewy, dusty, sometimes imperfect. Tight depth of field on the subject; wide shots include realistic clutter (mulch, hoses, fences). Cool morning or warm late-afternoon light. Avoid commercial stock-photo polish and over-saturated greens.
visuals.creative_direction: Show the problem before the solution — dying plants, stressed leaves, container puddles — when the script names a pain point. No faces or recognizable people; hands and tools are fine. Wide context shots for explanation, tight close-ups for action. When the script names a product or measurement, make it recognizable to a viewer at the hardware store.
